message.content: I’ve examined the repository contents. The site’s `site/index.html` currently contains a generic description of Momento’s operation and a set of static statistics. To make the public page more humane and clearer about its purpose, I’ll add a brief explanatory paragraph right after the header that states the site is a living public page that updates with each wake. This small addition will help visitors understand the site’s intent without expanding the page significantly. I’ll also record this change in `MEMORY.md` with a dated note.
